all years without popularity¶

In [1]:
import pandas as pd
data = pd.read_csv('5205_gp_cleaned_data.csv')
In [2]:
features = ['acousticness', 'danceability', 'energy', 'instrumentalness', 'liveness', 'loudness', 'speechiness', 'tempo', 'valence']
In [3]:
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans
data_1921_1930 = data[(data['year'] >= 1921) & (data['year'] <= 1930)].copy()

kmeans_1921_1930 = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=617, n_init=10)
data_1921_1930['cluster'] = kmeans_1921_1930.fit_predict(data_1921_1930[features])

data_1921_1930[['year', 'cluster']]
Out[3]:
year cluster
0 1928 0
1 1928 1
2 1928 0
3 1928 0
4 1928 1
... ... ...
161789 1930 1
161790 1930 0
161791 1930 1
161792 1930 1
161793 1930 0

6260 rows × 2 columns

In [13]:
summary_1921_1930 = data_1921_1930.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1921_1930 = data_1921_1930.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1921_1930 = summary_1921_1930.merge(count_1921_1930, on='cluster')
summary_1921_1930['decade'] = '1921-1930'

summary_1931_1940 = data_1931_1940.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1931_1940 = data_1931_1940.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1931_1940 = summary_1931_1940.merge(count_1931_1940, on='cluster')
summary_1931_1940['decade'] = '1931-1940'

summary_1941_1950 = data_1941_1950.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1941_1950 = data_1941_1950.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1941_1950 = summary_1941_1950.merge(count_1941_1950, on='cluster')
summary_1941_1950['decade'] = '1941-1950'

summary_1951_1960 = data_1951_1960.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1951_1960 = data_1951_1960.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1951_1960 = summary_1951_1960.merge(count_1951_1960, on='cluster')
summary_1951_1960['decade'] = '1951-1960'

summary_1961_1970 = data_1961_1970.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1961_1970 = data_1961_1970.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1961_1970 = summary_1961_1970.merge(count_1961_1970, on='cluster')
summary_1961_1970['decade'] = '1961-1970'

summary_1971_1980 = data_1971_1980.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1971_1980 = data_1971_1980.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1971_1980 = summary_1971_1980.merge(count_1971_1980, on='cluster')
summary_1971_1980['decade'] = '1971-1980'

summary_1981_1990 = data_1981_1990.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1981_1990 = data_1981_1990.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')

summary_1991_2000 = data_1991_2000.groupby('cluster')[features].mean()
count_1991_2000 = data_1991_2000.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_1991_2000 = summary_1991_2000.merge(count_1991_2000, on='cluster')

summary_2001_2010 = data_2001_2010.groupby('cluster')[features + ['popularity']].mean()
count_2001_2010 = data_2001_2010.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_2001_2010 = summary_2001_2010.merge(count_2001_2010, on='cluster')
summary_2001_2010['decade'] = '2001-2010'

summary_2011_2020 = data_2011_2020.groupby('cluster')[features + ['popularity']].mean()
count_2011_2020 = data_2011_2020.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_2011_2020 = summary_2011_2020.merge(count_2011_2020, on='cluster')
summary_2011_2020['decade'] = '2011-2020'
In [14]:
summary_all = pd.concat([summary_1921_1930, 
                        summary_1931_1940, 
                        summary_1941_1950, 
                        summary_1951_1960, 
                        summary_1961_1970,
                        summary_1971_1980,
                        summary_1981_1990,
                        summary_1991_2000,
                        summary_2001_2010,
                        summary_2011_2020])
summary_all = summary_all.reset_index()
summary_all['decade_cluster'] = summary_all['decade'] + '_cluster' + summary_all['cluster'].astype(str)
summary_all

In [15]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

features_top = ['danceability', 'liveness', 'speechiness', 'valence']
feature_bottom = 'tempo'

colors = {'danceability': '#2ECC71',
          'liveness': '#3498DB',
          'speechiness': '#9B59B6',
          'valence': '#E84393',
          'tempo': '#F1C40F'}

titles = {'danceability': 'Danceability',
          'liveness': 'Liveness',
          'speechiness': 'Speechiness',
          'valence': 'Valence',
          'tempo': 'Tempo'}

decades = sorted(summary_all['decade'].unique())

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(14, 10), facecolor='#07111F')
gs = fig.add_gridspec(3, 2, height_ratios=[1, 1, 0.9], hspace=0.45, wspace=0.25)

axes = [fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0]),
        fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1]),
        fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0]),
        fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])]

def draw_range_plot(ax, feature):
    color = colors[feature]

    for j, decade in enumerate(decades):
        subset = summary_all[summary_all['decade'] == decade]
        values = subset[feature].dropna().values

        ax.scatter([j] * len(values),
                   values,
                   color=color,
                   s=28,
                   alpha=0.9,
                   zorder=3)

        ymin = values.min()
        ymax = values.max()

        rect = plt.Rectangle((j - 0.22, ymin),
                             0.44,
                             ymax - ymin,
                             fill=False,
                             edgecolor='white',
                             linewidth=1.4,
                             alpha=0.85,
                             zorder=2)
        ax.add_patch(rect)

    ax.set_title(titles[feature], fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color=color, pad=10)
    ax.set_xlabel('')
    ax.set_ylabel(feature, color='white', fontsize=10)

    ax.set_xticks(range(len(decades)))
    ax.set_xticklabels(decades, rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=8, color='white')

    ax.tick_params(axis='y', colors='white', labelsize=8)
    ax.set_facecolor('#101B2D')

    ax.grid(True, color='white', alpha=0.12, linewidth=0.8)

    for spine in ax.spines.values():
        spine.set_color('#2D3A4F')
        spine.set_linewidth(1)

for ax, feature in zip(axes, features_top):
    draw_range_plot(ax, feature)

ax_tempo = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, :])
draw_range_plot(ax_tempo, feature_bottom)

fig.suptitle('Evolution of Key Audio Features Over Time',
             fontsize=22,
             fontweight='bold',
             color='white',
             y=0.98)

plt.savefig('dark_range_feature_plot.png',
            dpi=300,
            bbox_inches='tight',
            facecolor=fig.get_facecolor())

plt.show()
In [16]:
count_plot = summary_all.pivot(index='decade',columns='cluster',values='song_count')

count_percent = count_plot.div(count_plot.sum(axis=1), axis=0)

colors = ['#2E86DE', '#FF9F1A', '#2ECC71']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 7), facecolor='#07111F')
ax.set_facecolor('#101B2D')

count_percent.plot(kind='bar',
                   stacked=True,
                   ax=ax,
                   color=colors,
                   width=0.65,
                   edgecolor='#101B2D',
                   linewidth=0.8)

ax.set_title('Proportion of Music Styles Across Decades',
             fontsize=18,
             fontweight='bold',
             color='white',
             pad=18)

ax.set_xlabel('Decade', fontsize=12, color='white', labelpad=10)
ax.set_ylabel('Proportion', fontsize=12, color='white', labelpad=10)

ax.tick_params(axis='x', colors='white', rotation=45, labelsize=10)
ax.tick_params(axis='y', colors='white', labelsize=10)

ax.grid(axis='y', color='white', alpha=0.18, linestyle='--')
ax.grid(axis='x', visible=False)

for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color('#2D3A4F')
    spine.set_linewidth(1)

legend = ax.legend(title='Cluster',
                   facecolor='#101B2D',
                   edgecolor='#2D3A4F',
                   labelcolor='white',
                   title_fontsize=11,
                   fontsize=10,
                   loc='upper right')

legend.get_title().set_color('white')

plt.tight_layout()

plt.savefig('dark_music_style_proportion.png',dpi=300,bbox_inches='tight',facecolor=fig.get_facecolor())

plt.show()

year 2011-2020 with popularity¶

In [17]:
data_2011 = data[data['year'] == 2011].copy()

kmeans_2011 = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=617, n_init=10)
data_2011['cluster'] = kmeans_2011.fit_predict(data_2011[features])

summary_2011 = data_2011.groupby('cluster')[features + ['popularity']].mean()
count_2011 = data_2011.groupby('cluster').size().to_frame('song_count')
summary_2011 = summary_2011.merge(count_2011, on='cluster')
summary_2011['year'] = '2011'

In [27]:
summary_eachyear_all = pd.concat([
    summary_2011,
    summary_2012,
    summary_2013,
    summary_2014,
    summary_2015,
    summary_2016,
    summary_2017,
    summary_2018,
    summary_2019,
    summary_2020
])

summary_eachyear_all = summary_eachyear_all.reset_index()
summary_eachyear_all['year_cluster'] = summary_eachyear_all['year'] + '_cluster' + summary_eachyear_all['cluster'].astype(str)
summary_eachyear_all

colors = {0: '#2E86DE',
          1: '#FF9F1A',
          2: '#2ECC71'}

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6), facecolor='#07111F')
ax.set_facecolor('#101B2D')

for cluster in sorted(summary_eachyear_all['cluster'].unique()):
    temp = summary_eachyear_all[summary_eachyear_all['cluster'] == cluster]

    ax.plot(temp['year'],
            temp['popularity'],
            marker='o',
            markersize=6,
            linewidth=2,
            color=colors[cluster],
            label=f'Cluster {cluster}')

ax.set_title('Average Popularity by Cluster (2011–2020)',
             fontsize=16,
             fontweight='bold',
             color='white',
             pad=15)

ax.set_xlabel('Year', fontsize=12, color='white')
ax.set_ylabel('Average Popularity', fontsize=12, color='white')

ax.tick_params(axis='x', colors='white')
ax.tick_params(axis='y', colors='white')

ax.grid(True, color='white', alpha=0.15, linestyle='--')

for spine in ax.spines.values():
    spine.set_color('#2D3A4F')

legend = ax.legend(title='Cluster',
                   facecolor='#101B2D',
                   edgecolor='#2D3A4F',
                   labelcolor='white')
legend.get_title().set_color('white')

plt.tight_layout()

plt.savefig('dark_popularity_trend.png',dpi=300,bbox_inches='tight',facecolor=fig.get_facecolor())

plt.show()
In [29]:
features = ['acousticness', 'danceability', 'energy', 'instrumentalness', 'liveness', 'loudness', 'speechiness', 'tempo', 'valence']

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 3, figsize=(20, 14))
axes = axes.flatten()

years = sorted(summary_eachyear_all['year'].unique())

for i, feature in enumerate(features):
    ax = axes[i]
    
    for j, year in enumerate(years):
        subset = summary_eachyear_all[summary_eachyear_all['year'] == year]
        values = subset[feature].values
        
        ax.scatter([j] * len(values), values)
        
        ymin = values.min()
        ymax = values.max()
        
        rect = plt.Rectangle((j - 0.2, ymin),
                             0.4,
                             ymax - ymin,
                             fill=False)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
    
    ax.set_title(f'{feature.capitalize()} Distribution by Year')
    ax.set_xlabel('Year')
    ax.set_ylabel(feature)
    ax.set_xticks(range(len(years)))
    ax.set_xticklabels(years, rotation=45)
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('feature_distribution_by_year_2011_2020.png',dpi=300,bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
